settings.question: How do I enter my prescription?
settings.answer: On the product page, select your lens type and you will see a prescription form. Enter SPH, CYL, AXIS for each eye exactly as written on your prescription.

settings.question: What payment methods do you accept?
settings.answer: We accept Cash on Delivery (COD), EasyPaisa, and JazzCash across all of Pakistan.

settings.question: How long does delivery take?
settings.answer: We deliver in 3 to 5 business days across Pakistan. Free delivery on orders above Rs 3,000.

settings.question: Can I return my glasses?
settings.answer: Yes. We have a 7-day return policy. If you are not satisfied with your order, contact us and we will arrange a return or replacement.

settings.question: What is PD (Pupillary Distance)?
settings.answer: PD is the distance between the center of your two pupils in millimeters. It is usually between 58 and 68mm. You can find it on your prescription or measure it at home using a ruler and mirror.

settings.question: Do you make progressive lenses?
settings.answer: Yes, we make single vision and progressive lenses. Select your lens type on the product page when ordering.

settings.title: Frequently Asked Questions
settings.subtitle: Everything you need to know about ordering glasses online.
